title: Pull-Down Assay to Assess ATG2A Binding to WIPI4 and LC3B
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5p147","text":"This protocol describes how to assess ATG2A binding to WIPI4 and LC3B using a FLAG-based pull-down assay followed by SDS–PAGE and Western blot detection.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"dbblq","text":"SEC300:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8soe6","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"a1tlt","text":"\nSEC500:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d9tg7","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"98pmo","text":"\n","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"cellsMeta":{"0_0":"","0_1":"","0_2":"","1_0":"","1_1":"","1_2":"","2_0":"","2_1":"","2_2":""},"colTitles":["",""],"colWidths":[100,100],"data":[["HEPES, pH 7.5","25 mM "],["NaCl","300 mM "],["TCEP","1 mM "]],"guid":"9B861D3F10E6459094CD758AA1F2AE66","isJexcelDataFormat":true,"legend":"","mergeCells":{},"printData":[["HEPES, pH 7.5","25 mM "],["NaCl","300 mM "],["TCEP","1 mM "]],"rowHeights":[23,23,23]}},"1":{"type":"tables","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"cellsMeta":{"0_0":"","0_1":"","0_2":"","1_0":"","1_1":"","1_2":"","2_0":"","2_1":"","2_2":""},"colTitles":["",""],"colWidths":[100,100],"data":[["HEPES, pH 7.5","25 mM "],["NaCl","500 mM "],["TCEP","1 mM "]],"guid":"1BCF1C2C1D4B44A4B3A776FB43A1F733","isJexcelDataFormat":true,"legend":"","mergeCells":{},"printData":[["HEPES, pH 7.5","25 mM "],["NaCl","500 mM "],["TCEP","1 mM "]],"rowHeights":[23,23,23]}}}}
steps: Incubate beads coated with 3×FLAG-tagged ATG2A ( 5 µL slurry per condition) with 5 micromolar (µM) purified 6×HIS-tagged WIPI4, LC3B, or GFP (negative control) in SEC300 buffer.
Incubate for 01:00:00 at room temperature with gentle rotation.
Wash once with 100 µL SEC300 buffer. Add 40 µL SEC300 buffer to the beads.
Split the sample into two equal parts: Low-salt fraction – store on ice for analysis (see step 6) High-salt fraction
For the high-salt fraction perform the following washes ( 100 µL each): 2× washes with SEC300 buffer 1× wash with SEC500 buffer 2× washes with SEC300 buffer
Resuspend beads of low- and high-salt fraction in 20 µL SEC300 and mix with SDS loading buffer.

Analyze collected fractions by Western blot. Detect ATG2A ( anti-ATG2A Proteintech Catalog #23226-1-AP (RRID: AB_2879235) ) and HIS-tagged WIPI4 ( anti-HIS Qiagen Catalog #34660 (RRID: AB_2619735) ) using specific antibodies.
creator: Elisabeth Holzer
